questions.question: Which organelle is responsible for producing energy in the cell?
questions.explanation: Mitochondria are the powerhouse of the cell, producing ATP energy

questions.question: The cell membrane is composed primarily of
questions.explanation: Cell membrane = phospholipid bilayer + proteins

questions.question: The light-independent reaction of photosynthesis occurs in
questions.explanation: Calvin cycle occurs in the stroma of chloroplasts

questions.question: Anaerobic respiration produces
questions.explanation: Anaerobic respiration in animals produces lactic acid; in plants/yeast produces ethanol

questions.question: A gene is a segment of DNA that codes for
questions.explanation: A gene codes for a specific protein or trait

questions.question: If a pea plant is Aa (heterozygous), its phenotype shows
questions.explanation: Aa shows dominant phenotype because A is dominant over a

questions.question: Cross: Aa × aa. Probability of Aa offspring is
questions.explanation: Aa × aa gives 50% Aa and 50% aa

questions.question: DNA replication produces _____ daughter DNA molecules from one parent molecule
questions.explanation: Semi-conservative replication produces 2 identical daughter DNA molecules

questions.question: The largest biome on Earth is
questions.explanation: Oceans cover about 71% of Earth's surface

questions.question: In a food chain, plants are called
questions.explanation: Plants are autotrophs/producers in food chains

questions.question: Only about ___% of energy is transferred from one trophic level to the next
questions.explanation: 10% energy rule: only 10% energy transfers upward

questions.question: Carrying capacity is the
questions.explanation: Carrying capacity = maximum population an environment can support

questions.question: Natural selection favors
questions.explanation: Natural selection preserves beneficial traits

questions.question: Which is evidence for evolution?
questions.explanation: Multiple lines of evidence support evolution

questions.question: Which is a macronutrient?
questions.explanation: Macronutrients are proteins, carbohydrates, and lipids

questions.question: Amylase enzyme breaks down
questions.explanation: Amylase breaks down starch (carbohydrate)

questions.question: Gastric juice in the stomach contains
questions.explanation: Gastric juice = HCl + pepsin (protease)

questions.question: Meiosis produces _____ haploid cells from one diploid cell
questions.explanation: Meiosis produces 4 haploid cells (gametes)

questions.question: In females, meiosis produces

options.B: One large egg and polar bodies

questions.explanation: Oogenesis produces 1 ovum and 2-3 polar bodies

questions.question: The right side of the heart pumps blood to
questions.explanation: Right ventricle → pulmonary artery → lungs

questions.question: Which blood cell fights infections?
questions.explanation: White blood cells (leukocytes) fight infections

questions.question: Antibodies are produced by
questions.explanation: B lymphocytes produce antibodies

questions.question: In humans, water balance is regulated by
questions.explanation: Kidneys regulate water and electrolyte balance

questions.question: Body temperature is controlled by
questions.explanation: Hypothalamus is the temperature control center

questions.question: Normal blood pH is approximately
questions.explanation: Normal blood pH ≈ 7.35-7.45 (slightly alkaline)
